title: Quantum Entanglement: Spooky Action at a Distance
description: Discover the most mysterious and powerful resource in quantum computing - entanglement. Learn how particles can be correlated in ways impossible classically, and how this enables quantum teleportation and superdense coding.
learningObjectives: Define quantum entanglement and distinguish it from classical correlations
Identify and create Bell states - maximally entangled two-qubit states
Explain why entanglement cannot be used for faster-than-light communication
Calculate whether a given state is entangled using the separability criterion
Understand entanglement as a resource for quantum protocols
Implement entanglement generation and measurement in code
